testcase.failure: tests\test_e2e.py:30: in test_new_user_complete_flow assert dashboard.json['data']['overall_progress'] == 0 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'data'

testcase.name: test_multiple_users_isolated_data

failure.message: assert None != None + where None = <WrapperTestResponse streamed [404 NOT FOUND]>.json + and None = <WrapperTestResponse streamed [404 NOT FOUND]>.json
